key_strengths: Empty set warning and fallback escalation rule documented — closes the primary v2 gap
Audit-Ready Commands section with inline 5-set Python test enables rapid functional verification
Input mode documentation in Response Template Assumptions improves output traceability
Dual input modes (dict and name/list pair) provide flexibility for different data preparation workflows
Clear scope boundary (4+ sets, set intersection only) prevents misuse for non-set visualization tasks

recommendations.title: No color customization documented
recommendations.problem: The skill does not document color customization options for the UpSet plot, which is a common publication requirement.
recommendations.root_cause: No --color-scheme or --palette parameter exists in the current script.
recommendations.fix: Add a note: 'Color customization is not currently supported. For custom colors, modify the matplotlib color cycle in scripts/main.py.'

recommendations.title: No maximum set count guidance documented
recommendations.problem: The skill does not document a maximum number of sets before the plot becomes unreadable.
recommendations.root_cause: Parameters table does not include guidance on practical set count limits.
recommendations.fix: Add to Notes or Common Pitfalls: 'UpSet plots become difficult to read with more than 8–10 sets. For larger set counts, consider filtering to the most relevant sets or using a different visualization.'
